triggers toggle now.

Install next-themes, add ThemeProvider + ThemeToggle, define CSS
design tokens for both modes in globals.css, migrate ~1500 hardcoded
colors to semantic tokens across all components. Sidebar is light in
light mode, dark navy in dark mode. All color-coded elements (badges,
file types, status indicators) use dark: variants.

Rename package from com.notification to org.notification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Grafana dashboard by setting datasource UID and enabling histogram metrics

Dashboard panels referenced datasource uid "prometheus" but the
provisioned datasource had no explicit UID. Also enabled percentiles
histogram for HTTP server requests so p95/p99 latency panels have data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Redis cache serialization by using JSON instead of JDK serializer

The default JdkSerializationRedisSerializer requires cached objects to
implement Serializable. Entity classes (User, Device, NotificationTemplate)
don't, causing every @Cacheable call to fail with SerializationException
and resulting in 100% load test failures. Switch to
GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer. Also promote load-client error
logging from DEBUG to ERROR for better visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace wildcard imports with explicit single-class imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add healthcheck to notification-server for load-client readiness

The load-client was starting before the notification-server Spring Boot
app was ready, causing 100% request failures. Use actuator health
endpoint as healthcheck and require service_healthy condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Docker build by generating per-service settings.gradle

Each Dockerfile was copying the shared settings.gradle which references
all subprojects, but only one subproject's source was available during
build. Generate a minimal settings.gradle with only the target subproject.

commit.message:
opus-2026-03-08-S48: v4 bucket accumulation (fix buffer overflow, ~5% gain)

Buckets LCD/z_val by t-value, shifts at end instead of per-partition.
Fixed critical buffer overflow: max_t = C(n,2), not C(n,2)/2.
n=150 8T: 4.9s (vs v3's 5.3s). Modest gain since division dominates.

Increase gunicorn timeout to 120s for large Calendly lookback windows

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Calculator-first layout migration: all 34 calculator pages

Restructured every calculator template from:
  H1 → H2 → Answer Capsule → [Subtitle] → [Disclaimer] → TOC → Top Ad → Calculator

To:
  H1 → [Subtitle] → Calculator → Top Ad → H2 → Answer Capsule → [Disclaimer] → TOC → Content

Reasoning:
- Users from search want the tool immediately
- Answer capsule + TOC pushed calculator below the fold on mobile
- With calculator-first: user finds tool faster, lower bounce rate
- Educational content below calculator means users scroll past ads
  after getting results (reading about methodology, checking FAQ)
- Top ad repositioned between calculator and content: high viewability
  because users always scroll past it to read about their results

Verified all 36 pages (34 calculators + home + resources):
- HTTP 200, header, footer, Inter font, nav menu, styles.css
- OG tags, JSON-LD schema, breadcrumbs, explore-more
- Calculator div appears before answer-capsule in DOM order
- No duplicate ad placements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Use huggingface_hub.login() for pyannote auth

Different pyannote versions use different kwargs (use_auth_token vs
token). Using huggingface_hub.login() works across all versions.

feat: add mobile compatibility spec, examples, and validation for UI plugins

timeouts. This documents the "embed first, upgrade silently" pattern
and adds a validator warning for plugins that lack fallback data.

Classify UnpackedArrayConcatDescending → §10.10.1 [skip ci]

fix: obstacles now appear correctly and improve visibility across levels

- GameScene: fix obstacle body position after setOrigin(0.5,1) by calling
  body.reset() to sync the physics body to the corrected origin; obstacles
  were spawning with body misaligned (18px too low), hiding them at/in ground

  tiles and background decor

  (bright emerald) so trees are visible against the dark #2d5016 background

Fix MOSFET board calculation using section-specific channel counts

The MOSFET calculation was subtracting all globally used channels from
the section's requirement, making it appear no new boards were needed.
Now correctly counts only channels assigned to the selected section's
components, then checks free channels for the remainder.

commit.message:
Fix nginx proxy Host header for ACA Envoy routing (#466)

* Fix backend container crash — create data_dir before SQLite init (#448)

The container crashes on startup because SQLite can't open the database
file at ~/.terrascry/datasets/terrascry.db — the parent directory doesn't
exist in the container filesystem. Ensure data_dir is created when
computing the default database URL.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix frontend deploy verify — use az CLI health check instead of curl (#450)

The frontend is behind Cloudflare Access, so curl gets a 403. Use
az containerapp revision list to check the revision health state instead.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add marketing landing page at terrascry.com (#452)

Astro static site at platform/landing/ deployed to Cloudflare Pages.
Dark zinc + emerald design matching the platform design system.
Sections: hero, platform triad (Pathfinder/HIRT/GeoSim), workflow,
use cases (archaeology/UXO/defense/research), ecosystem map, CTA.

DNS updated: terrascry.com now points to CF Pages instead of Azure.
CI workflow deploys on push to main via wrangler.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Remove hardcoded demo from WelcomeOverlay (#454)

Replace "Load Demo Survey" (hardcoded iron_age_hillfort) with a proper
empty state: "Open Mission File" + "Start Live Survey" as primary
actions, with reference datasets listed below for quick access.

No more "demo" concept in the app — users load data through File menu
or select from available reference datasets.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Show backend connection status honestly (#456)

When the backend is unreachable:
- Toolbar shows red "offline" badge instead of empty version
- WelcomeOverlay shows "Backend unavailable" with clear message
- All backend-dependent actions are hidden until connected
- No more silent failures that lead users on

When connected:
- Toolbar shows actual version from /api/runtime
- WelcomeOverlay shows action buttons and reference datasets

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix frontend deploy verify — use grep instead of exact match (#458)

The az CLI returns health status for all active revisions (one per line).
When multiple revisions are active during rollover, the exact string
match `[[ "$HEALTH" == "Healthy" ]]` fails because the output contains
multiple lines. Use `grep -q` to check that at least one is healthy.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix nginx envsubst destroying proxy config variables (#460)

The default nginx:alpine 20-envsubst-on-templates.sh runs envsubst on
ALL $VAR patterns, replacing nginx variables ($host, $uri, $remote_addr,
$proxy_add_x_forwarded_for, etc.) with empty strings. This broke the
proxy_pass and proxy_set_header directives, causing /api/ requests to
fail with 404.

Fix: use a custom entrypoint that runs envsubst with only $BACKEND_ORIGIN,
preserving all nginx internal variables.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix nginx proxy — use NGINX_ENVSUBST_FILTER instead of custom entrypoint (#462)

The previous fix (custom entrypoint with CMD override) didn't work in
Azure Container Apps. Use the built-in NGINX_ENVSUBST_FILTER env var
to restrict envsubst to only BACKEND_ORIGIN, preserving nginx variables.
Template goes back into /etc/nginx/templates/ (the standard location).

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix nginx proxy — use $proxy_host to match ACA Envoy Host routing (#465)

$host sends the frontend's domain (app.terrascry.com) as the Host header
to the backend's internal Envoy ingress. ACA Envoy routes by Host header
even on internal traffic, rejecting requests with a 1946-byte 404 before
FastAPI ever sees them. $proxy_host sends the backend's internal FQDN,
which Envoy accepts.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
